---
title: "About this blog"
---

# Yeongeun Jeon

<center><img src="images/그림1.png" width="600" height="400"></center>

Welcome to our blog! This is the personal blog of Yeongeun Jeon, coming to you from Korea. 
This is where I'm going to record what I'm studying, especially the analyses using R. 

To give you a brief introduction of me,

- B.S. Statistics, Yeungnam University, Korea, 2018.02
- Ph.D student from Yeungnam University, Korea.
- Interests :  Machine Learning, Time series, Spatial statistics etc.

## Project

- [Visualization Ver. 1](https://leehoo1928.shinyapps.io/ggplot_Ver1/)
- [Visualization Ver. 2](https://leehoo1928.shinyapps.io/ggplot_Ver2/)

## Paper

- [Estimation for a half-triangular distribution based on unified hybrid censored sample (2018)](https://www.dbpia.co.kr/Journal/articleDetail?nodeId=NODE07568231)

- [Estimation of the exponentiated half-logistic distribution based on multiply Type-I hybrid censoring (2019)](http://www.csam.or.kr/journal/view.html?doi=10.29220/CSAM.2020.27.1.047)

- ARIMA모형과 DLM을 이용한 테러 발생 건수 예측 (2020), Korean terrorism studies Review, 13, 102-114.

- [Estimation for the half-logistic distribution based on multiply Type-II hybrid censoring (2020)](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/abs/pii/S037843712030220X)

- [Bayesian estimation for the exponential distribution based on generalized multiply Type-II hybrid censoring (2020)](http://www.csam.or.kr/journal/view.html?doi=10.29220/CSAM.2020.27.4.413)

- [	New Approach for a Weibull Distribution under the Progressive Type-II Censoring Scheme (2020)](https://www.mdpi.com/2227-7390/8/10/1713)

- [Estimation of the Rayleigh Distribution under Unified Hybrid Censoring (2021)](https://ajs.or.at/index.php/ajs/article/view/990)
